ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "company_sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_sector FOREIGN KEY ("company_sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_parent" INTEGER /* Parent sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the report belongs to */,
  "qtr_end_date" TEXT /* Date at the end of the quarter */,
  "qtr_end_closing_price" REAL /* Closing stock price at the end of the quarter */,
  "shares_outstanding" INTEGER /* Number of shares outstanding */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales reported in the quarter */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses reported in the quarter */,
  "pat" REAL /* Profit after tax (PAT) reported in the quarter */,
  "reporting_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the report is presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report the announcement is related to */,
  "ann_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial announcement */,
  "early_ann" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the announcement was made early (0 or 1) */,
  "stck_ann" REAL /* Stock price on the day of the announcement */,
  "next_day" REAL /* Stock price on the day after the announcement */,
  "announcement_type" TEXT /* Type of announcement (e.g., quarterly results, annual report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the date */,
  "trading_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report the ratio is calculated from */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio (e.g., P/E ratio, ROE) */,
  "ratio_value" REAL /* Value of the financial ratio */,
  "ratio_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the prediction is for */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value (e.g., stock price, financial metric) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Debt, Equity, Dividends) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company officer */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the officer belongs to */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the company officer */,
  "officer_designation" TEXT /* Designation of the company officer (e.g., CEO, CFO) */,
  "officer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company officer */,
  "officer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_officers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the shareholder belongs to */,
  "shareholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the company shareholder */,
  "shareholder_type" TEXT /* Type of shareholder (e.g., institutional, individual) */,
  "shareholder_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company shareholder */,
  "shareholder_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company shareholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_shareholders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the article is related to */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "article_source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
